film.title: Mannequin Two: On the Move
film.overview: Although Jason works as a department store clerk, he is also a reincarnated prince. Long ago, his beloved Jessie was snatched away from him by an evil wizard who used his powers to transform her into wooden statue. Now Jessie is in Jason's department store as a mannequin. When he encounters her, she awakens from her thousand-year sleep. They quickly revive their romance, but the evil wizard has been reincarnated as well, and he's up to no good.

dialogues.dialogue: I love Jason. You can't make me go with you.  Here now.  My lovely... You've been stealing furniture from us. Shame!  You've been stealing furniture from us. Shame!  I didn't steal it. She bought it for me.
